title: Grace Hopper
ground_truth_corrupted_sentence: Her parents, Walter Fletcher Murray and Mary Campbell Van Horne, were of Scottish and Danish descent, and attended West End Collegiate Church.
guessed_corrupted_sentence: Before joining the Navy, Hopper earned a Ph.D. in both mathematics and mathematical physics from Yale University and was a professor of mathematics at Vassar College.

parsed_response.corrupted_sentence: Before joining the Navy, Hopper earned a Ph.D. in both mathematics and mathematical physics from Yale University and was a professor of mathematics at Vassar College.
parsed_response.explanation: Grace Hopper earned a single Ph.D. in mathematics from Yale University in 1934, not dual Ph.D.s in mathematics and mathematical physics. The article later correctly states she earned a Ph.D. in mathematics, confirming this inconsistency.
